title: Zheepho
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Zheepho |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Thanks, Healer. I don't know what you did, but I'll take a barrel of it.''"
"''I'll come back and check on you in a little while.|Zheepho expresses his gratitude to Padawan Barriss Offee after his bota injection|}} '''Zheepho''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]' [[Battle of Drongar]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. During the battle, Zheepho was struck by [[smashbone fever]], a chronic disease that threatened to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him. However, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] injected the Rodian with extract from the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]], which saved his life. ==Biography== {{Quote|Zheepho, I'm Barriss Offee, a Jedi healer.''"
"''Ex-excuse m-m-me if I d-don't g-g-get up, H-H-Healer.|Barriss Offee and Zheepho|}} Zheepho was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He had a chronic disease, [[smashbone fever]], that had been latent for [[Standard year/Legends|years]] by [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. In that year,''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Zheepho was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] while the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Battle of Drongar|fought]] against the [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] on the planet, Zeepho suffered a sudden relapse of his disease, leaving him near [[Death/Legends|death]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] used the extract of [[Bota/Legends|bota]]—a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to Drongar—to treat his condition. Zheepho recovered just two [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] after the bota was injected into him, and he thanked Offee for her efforts. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I have a treatment here that might help you. But there is some risk, which I can't calculate properly.''"
"''Right n-now, Healer, I would g-gladly take p-p-poison if y-you offered it-ahhh-!|Barriss Offee and Zheepho, prior to the bota injection|}} Zheepho was desperate when he was struck by the smashbone fever on Drongar. Although ill, the Rodian apologized for not getting up when Offee began to talk to him. When Offee told him that she was not entirely sure what effects the bota would have on Rodian anatomy, he told her to use it on him anyway and suggested that he would even take [[Poison/Legends|poison]] if she gave it to him. Zheepho was very optimistic despite his illness and believed he could hold still long enough for Offee to inject him with the bota. He later showed his manners when he thanked the [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healer]] after she cured him. ==Behind the scenes== Zheepho appeared in ''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'', the second novel of the [[MedStar Duology]]. ''Jedi Healer'' was written by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]], and published in [[2004]]. ==Appearances== *''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zheepho }} [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic officers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Rodians]]
